name: mcoe-docs
description: MCOE docs — content + config rendered by the Nebula Docs CLI from acasaro/nebula-docs
//: Build/dev runs from the framework monorepo (acasaro/nebula-docs). Locally: `cd /path/to/nebula-docs && pnpm --filter @nebula-docs/cli {dev|build} /path/to/this/repo`. CI checks out both repos and runs the build from the framework side. Once @nebula-docs/cli is published to npm, this repo will gain a real `devDependencies` block and stand alone.
